## UserRuntime.UserLibraryRuntime.evictSession() method

Evicts a materialized session from the cache. The persisted session remains in the library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
evictSession(sessionId: PersistedSessionId): boolean;
```

</td><td>

Session to evict


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
